title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What a massive haul! You did great!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
This should be more than enough! Thanks a ton,
Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nothin' much. Seeing you flaunt your skills has
got me itchin' for a little competition!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Let's see who can get the most prizes! You in?!
choice_data_list: I thought you didn't have any money.
